card_text:

Abyssal Hunter can inflict 1 damage on any minion as a Ⓓ action. During your unlock phase, Abyssal Hunter inflicts 1 damage on a ready vampire you control. Burn Abyssal Hunter if any ranged aggravated damage is inflicted on it (even if prevented).

name: Abyssal Hunter

This ally can enter combat with a minion as a Ⓓ action. This ally cannot be the target of directed actions requiring Dominate [dom] or Presence [pre]. In combat, strikes made by this ally cannot be dodged. This ally cannot gain life (instead, any life it would gain goes to the blood bank).

rulings.text: Does not prevent the opponent from dodging, the dodge just has no effect. [LSJ 20030902-2] [LSJ 20060808-1]

name: Aggressive Corpse

Akhenaten can play cards requiring basic Necromancy [nec] as a 3-capacity vampire. In combat with a Follower of Set, any damage he inflicts is aggravated. Akhenaten can burn himself to burn a Follower of Set controlled by your prey as a Ⓓ action. If he is burned, shuffle him into his owner's library.

rulings.text: If they use their last life to play an action modifier, the action fails. If they use their last life to play a strike, combat ends before strike resolution. [ANK 20180928-1]

rulings.group: Allies who can play as a vampire

rulings.text: If a card they play as a vampire sends them to torpor (eg. {Reform Body}), they burn. REVERSAL of previous rulings. [LSJ 20060409]

rulings.text: They cannot use a card to commit diablerie (eg. {Amaranth}) [RTR 19970630] [LSJ 20080717]
rulings.group: Allies who can play as a vampire

Is not shuffled into the library when it is discarded. [LSJ 20010710]
The ally counts as "independent" when playing cards as a vampire [LSJ 20020503] [LSJ 20060126]

rulings.text: If they use their last life to play an action modifier, the action fails. If they use their last life to play a strike, combat ends before strike resolution. [ANK 20180928-1]

While a minion has an effect that allows them to play cards that require Discipline(s), they do not actually have those Discipline(s). [LSJ 19980303]

Multiple similar effects (e.g. two {Infernal Familiar}, or {Ian Forestal} with an {Infernal Familiar}) cannot be used to meet the requirements of a multi-Discipline card that the minion is missing one or more Disciplines to play. [LSJ 20020218]

[LSJ 20080205-2] [LSJ 20060417]
The ally counts as "independent" when playing cards as a vampire [LSJ 20020503] [LSJ 20060126]
